variants.name: Full proposed method
variants.code_level_meaning: Default proposed framework with all modules enabled.

variants.name: No A* initialization
variants.code_level_meaning: Sets seed_ratio=0.0 to remove A*-guided NSGA-II initialization.

variants.name: Reduced B-Spline representation
variants.code_level_meaning: Uses piecewise-linear trajectory construction inside NSGA-II evaluation and output construction; safety repair may still invoke spline-based repair if needed.

variants.name: Reduced-objective NSGA-II
variants.code_level_meaning: Replaces the five distinct NSGA-II objectives with a length-only objective tuple.

variants.name: No softmin adaptive fusion
variants.code_level_meaning: Disables softmin blending and uses the Length champion as a fixed final path.

variants.name: No post-processing
variants.code_level_meaning: Disables collision repair, smoothing, obstacle escape, curvature re-splining, and junction smoothing after optimization.
